pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 17 would result in incorrect bytecode or runtime incompatibility with Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may not fully support Java 21 or may have compatibility issues with the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace jackson-module-jaxb-annotations with jackson-module-jakarta-xmlbind-annotations to use Jakarta EE namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact uses javax.xml.bind which is removed in Java 11+ and replaced by jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+; using the old artifact causes compile errors or missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit jakarta.annotation-api dependency as it is now provided by Spring Boot BOM.
pom.xml.why_exists: Redundant dependency declaration; removing it avoids potential version conflicts, though not strictly a compile failure if versions match.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven-compiler-plugin source/target configuration with release flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target flags are deprecated in favor of release in Java 9+; while not strictly a compile error, it is the modern standard and required for proper module path handling in newer JDKs.
Newer versions may offer better compatibility with Java 21 bytecode.
Minor version bump for plugin compatibility.
Newer plugin version ensures compatibility with Java 21 compilation features.
Minor version bump for plugin compatibility.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta annotations and descriptors.

src/test/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Remove unused static import of java.lang.String.format
Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation
src/test/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.before: return format("SELECT %s FROM jhi_date_time_wrapper where id=%d", fieldName, id);
src/test/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.after: return "SELECT %s FROM jhi_date_time_wrapper where id=%d".formatted(fieldName, id);

src/test/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/test/java/dev/arnaldo/seizure/manage.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with --enable-preview or trigger warnings/errors in strict linting environments expecting the new annotation.

Refactor instanceof checks to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
